session.user: Run `uv run pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/objective/test_view_cmd.py tests/unit/cli/commands/objective/test_check_cmd.py -v --tb=short` and report results. Do NOT modify any files.
session.assistant: I'll run the specified pytest tests and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest for objective view and check command tests
